meaning: n.旋涡,旋风,涡流,(动乱,争论等的)中心
examples: The polar vortex is a system of wintertime winds.
They were caught up in a whirling vortex of emotion.
When marriages break down children are swept into the vortex of their parents' embittered emotions.
This attempt to manage versus lead our way out of the VUCA vortex seldom is successful.
The invention of vortex filters may, however, lead to at least a partial rethink.
